text:
[
  {
    "thinking": "I am identifying the initial state of the screen recording. The video starts on a dark screen with instructional text from the Askable platform. A small video feed of the participant is visible in the top right corner.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 0,
    "time_end_ms": 0,
    "description": "Initial screen state: Dark background with instructional text 'Great. To start, please click the \"Share\" button...' and a participant video feed in the top right.",
    "confidence": 1,
    "page_title": "Askable Sessions",
    "page_location": "https://sessions.askable.com/s/j-mod89919145853d08ad8c84ad",
    "frame_description": "A dark screen with white text providing instructions for starting a screen sharing session."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The UI updates as new instructions are typed out on the screen for the participant to read. This is an automated system change, not a user action, but it significantly changes the visual state of the page.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 1300,
    "time_end_ms": 38850,
    "description": "The instructional text on the screen updates, typing out a scenario about planning a holiday from the Sunshine Coast to London.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "Askable Sessions",
    "page_location": "https://sessions.askable.com/s/j-mod89919145853d08ad8c84ad",
    "frame_description": "The text on the dark background is dynamically updating to show the task instructions."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The system finishes typing the scenario and presents a final set of instructions along with an 'Open' button to begin the task.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 38850,
    "time_end_ms": 46750,
    "description": "The final instruction screen appears, asking the user to think aloud and providing an 'Open' button.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "page_title": "Askable Sessions",
    "page_location": "https://sessions.askable.com/s/j-mod89919145853d08ad8c84ad",
    "frame_description": "The screen shows the final instructions and a central 'Open' button with an external link icon."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor to the 'Open' button and pauses briefly before clicking. This indicates they are preparing to start the task.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 46750,
    "time_end_ms": 48150,
    "description": "User hovers the cursor over the 'Open' button.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Open",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button in the center of the screen."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks the 'Open' button to proceed to the task website. I see the button react to the click.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 48150,
    "time_end_ms": 48250,
    "description": "User clicks the 'Open' button.",
    "confidence": 1,
    "interaction_target": "Open",
    "frame_description": "The 'Open' button is activated by a user click."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Clicking the 'Open' button triggers a navigation to a new tab. I am tracking the duration from the click until the new page is fully rendered.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 48250,
    "time_end_ms": 51300,
    "description": "A new browser tab opens and loads the Google homepage.",
    "confidence": 1,
    "page_title": "Google",
    "page_location": "https://www.google.com/",
    "frame_description": "A new tab opens, initially showing a blank page and then loading the Google search interface."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The Google homepage has finished loading. I am recording this as a UI state change to mark the beginning of the user's interaction with the target site.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 51300,

    "description": "The Google homepage is fully loaded and visible.",
    "confidence": 1,
    "page_title": "Google",
    "page_location": "https://www.google.com/",
    "frame_description": "The standard Google search page is displayed with the logo, search bar, and buttons."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves their cursor over the search input field and pauses, likely considering their first search term as per the instructions.",
    "type": "hover",

    "description": "User hovers the cursor over the Google search input area.",
    "confidence": 0.8,

  },

    "thinking": "The user clicks into the search bar to begin typing.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 75300,

    "description": "User clicks inside the Google search bar.",
    "confidence": 1,

    "page_location": "https://www.google.com/",
    "frame_description": "The cursor clicks the search input field, making it active."

  {
    "thinking": "As a result of clicking the search bar, Google's 'Trending searches' dropdown menu appears. This is a significant UI state change.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
